'''Mandell''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] colony world. It was once devastated by drought, requiring grain shipments from [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. Unfortunately, these shipments contained [[radark]]s, which infested the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
